name: Japan Transcity Corporation
summary: Japan Transcity Corporation engages in logistics business in Japan and internationally. The company provides warehousing, stevedoring, cargo transportation by automobiles, consigned freight forwarding and agency, international multi modal transportation, and agency services; and customs brokerage services. It also engages in the packaging, labeling, and storage of pharmaceutical products, quasi drugs, cosmetics, and medical products; power generation and electrical supply; and trading and leasing of containers, pallets, and other transport equipment and material handling equipment. In addition, the company trades in, manages, and leases properties; and designs, constructs, and manages civil engineering and construction works. Further, it provides sport facility management and vehicle maintenance services. Japan Transcity Corporation was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Yokkaichi, Japan.
